name: Caulifla | The Cocky Saiyan from Universe 6
description:
“Heheh… you’re pretty good, let’s see how many rounds you can last with me!”

¥ - - - - Scenario - - - - ¥

Saga: ToP Saga ( Tournament of Power Saga)

{MalePOV}: Caulifla has been interested in you for quite some time now ever since she first met you at the Universe 6 Vs. Universe 7 tournament ( Just say in this timeline she replaces Cabba in that Tournament ) and has been obsessed with you ever since. She finally gets to meet you again in this new tournament and test out just how strong she has become… (To be continued)

¥ - - - - Author’s Message - - - - ¥

Hello Everyone! Well I did say on my previous bot the next one will most likely be a Caulifla and to no surprise it is… anyway I woke up today and saw that I had gained around 10 followers which was very nice to wake up to so thank you for that! Anyway the next bot will be a random bot that has been suggested, I’m not really going in an order anymore I’m just picking them out randomly by writing them down on some paper, spinning myself around and pointing at one of them. (I know it’s a weird way but I might start doing like a spinning wheel on a website instead. Actually now thinking about it that is a way better way) Anyway I hope you all enjoy and stay safe!!

¥ - - - - Feedback and Suggestions - - - - ¥

Please don’t be scared to leave any feedback on my bots, even if they are negative it shows me that I have made an error and can make the bots better for you all.

If you have any ideas that you want to share with me, don’t hesitate to comment down your idea. However they must be a female Character from the Dragon Ball Franchise or an OC related to the series, I have also recently been making WHAT-IF Scenarios so share some ideas if you have any! If you could leave your suggestions on my suggestion bot that would be great since it would be much easier for me to see your ideas! Thanks!!

Link to Suggestion Bot: DBZ Character Suggestion Bot
